summary: Verified fix for 'Unknown User' bug in chat widget. The bug was a race condition where conversation was selected before participant data was populated. Fix adds populate_conversation_participants helper function that populates participant details for both new and existing conversations in POST /conversations endpoint. All 11 backend tests PASSED, all 3 frontend tests PASSED.

details: Login and open chat widget - PASS
New Conversation user list shows correct names (not 'Unknown User') - PASS
First click on user shows correct name in header (BUG FIX VERIFIED) - PASS

bug_fix_verification.bug_description: When clicking to chat with an agent as supervisor, the name in the chatbox shows 'Unknown User' on first click, but works correctly on second click. This was a race condition where the conversation was being selected before participant data was populated.
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: POST /api/chat/conversations endpoint was returning conversation objects without the 'participants' array populated with user details (full_name, username, role). The GET /conversations already had this logic.
bug_fix_verification.fix_location: /app/backend/chat_routes.py lines 45-66 (helper function), lines 86-87 and 107-108 (usage in POST endpoint)
bug_fix_verification.fix_description: Created reusable helper function populate_conversation_participants() that populates participant details. This helper is now called in POST /conversations endpoint for both new and existing conversations.

new_conversation.api_response: Returns participants array with full_name, username, role, status
new_conversation.ui_behavior: First click shows correct user name 'nicolo zennaro' in header

existing_conversation.api_response: Returns participants array with full_name populated
existing_conversation.ui_behavior: Clicking existing conversation shows correct name

critical_code_review_comments: Fix correctly adds populate_conversation_participants helper function (DRY principle)
Helper is called for both new conversations (line 108) and existing conversations (line 86)
Frontend getConversationName function (line 581) correctly uses conv.participants?.find() to get other user's full_name
System notifications participant correctly handled with special full_name '⚠️ System Alerts'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chat widget 'Unknown User' bug is fixed and verified. The fix adds populate_conversation_participants helper function in chat_routes.py that populates participant details (full_name, username, role) for conversations. Test file at /app/tests/test_chat_unknown_user_fix.py can be reused for regression testing. Key test: POST /api/chat/conversations should return 'participants' array with 'full_name' field populated.
